description_long: This bungalow features a spacious single-story layout with a combination of brick and wood exterior walls, topped by a series of red gable and hip roofs. The front yard is landscaped with green grass, flowering trees, and a circular stone path leading to a covered porch area. The property includes a large garage, a backyard with a swimming pool, a gazebo, and several outdoor seating areas. Multiple large windows, including a prominent bay window, provide ample natural light and views of the garden. The rear of the house is bordered by a wooden fence and lined with tall palm trees for privacy. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a comfortable and inviting residential environment.
description: A single-story brick and wood bungalow with red gable roofs, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a large garage. Features include a covered porch, bay window, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, bay window, landscaped yard, and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, palm tree border, and the rear garden layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, wooden fence, and gazebo near the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, gazebo, and flowering trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade and grouped side windows
